    open
    title="Confirm action"
    actions={[

stories.name: With Actions
Loading Action
stories.snippet:
const LoadingAction = () => <Dialog
    open
    title="Saving changes"
    actions={[
      { label: "Cancel", onClick: () => {}, disabled: true },
      { label: "Saving...", onClick: () => {}, variant: "filled", loading: true },
    ]}>Please wait while your changes are being saved...</Dialog>;

stories.name: No Title
Playground
All Sides
Fill Only
Outline Only
Negative Offset
Head Only

notchOffset.description: Offset from start of edge. Positive = from top/left, negative = from bottom/right

fill.description: SVG fill color. Defaults to surface-container-low. Set "none" to disable.

stroke.description: SVG stroke color. Defaults to primary. Set "none" to disable.

headOnly.description: Render only the notch tab, no body

stories.name: Playground
Email Only
Passkey Only

defaultValue.value: "For your security, please verify your identity before continuing."

onEmailSendCode.description: Send a 6-digit code to the user's email. Returns a challenge ID.

onEmailVerifyCode.description: Verify the 6-digit code. Receives challengeId + code, returns reauth token.

onPasskeyVerify.description: Run WebAuthn ceremony, returns reauth token.
